summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Módulo Mixeiro de Imóveis - all features working correctly including property listings, filtering, details, gallery, inquiry system, and integration with existing authentication
passed_tests: ✅ Backend API - GET /api/properties returns 8 properties with correct types
✅ Backend API - Property filtering by type (apartamento, casa, terreno, comercial)
✅ Backend API - Property filtering by transaction (venda, aluguel)
✅ Backend API - GET /api/properties/{id} returns complete property details
✅ Backend API - POST /api/property-inquiries creates inquiries successfully
✅ Backend API - GET /api/property-inquiries returns user inquiries
✅ Frontend - Properties page loads with purple branding (#9333EA)
✅ Frontend - Property cards display correctly with images and data
✅ Frontend - Type filters work (8 properties → 3 apartamentos when filtered)
✅ Frontend - Transaction filters work (Venda/Aluguel/Tudo)
✅ Frontend - Property detail page shows complete information
✅ Frontend - Photo gallery displays multiple images
✅ Frontend - Property features/characteristics listed correctly
✅ Frontend - Owner information displayed (name + phone)
✅ Frontend - Inquiry form submission works
✅ Frontend - Redirect to inquiries page after submission
✅ Frontend - Inquiries page shows submitted inquiry with status
✅ Frontend - Bottom navigation updated with Imóveis icon
✅ Frontend - Dashboard card for Properties works
✅ Integration - Complete end-to-end property browsing and inquiry flow
✅ Authentication - Session-based access to protected property endpoints
success_percentage: backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed), frontend: 100% (all UI flows successful)
